chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI J. Misc. Application No. 02 to 05 of 2018 Date Order with Signature of Judge For hearing of CMA No.995/2018 16.01.2026 Ms. Alizay Mehak, advocate for applicants Kh. Shoaib Mansoor, advocate for respondents ---------- Counsel for applicant in J.M.Nos.02 to 05 of 2018 submits that (i) subject patent No.141496 in J.M.No.02/2018, has expired on 26.11.2023; (ii) subject patent No.141336 in J.M.No.03/2018 expired on 23.12.1999; (iii) subject patent No.139273 in J.M.No.04/2018 expired on 14.01.2024; and, (iv) subject patent No.141341 in J.M.No.05/2018 expired on 23.12.2019. Given the above, Counsel no longer wishes to proceed with these J.Ms., which may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. J. Misc. Applications stand dismissed as above. Office to place a copy of this order in the connected matter. J U D G E Ashraf
